judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes all required eye-exposure actions in the correct sequence: rinse 15–20 minutes, remove contacts after 5 minutes and continue rinsing, then call poison control or a doctor. It also preserves the do-not-stop-rinsing warning and escalation instruction without adding unsupported advice.
